keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY URINARY ORGANS. Urinary organs : Ap., Ars., Bell., Berb., Cann., Canth., Caust., Fer., Hep., Lyc., Merc-c., Merc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sars., Sul., Terb., Thu. Urinary organs, kidneys : Ap., Ars., Berb., Canth., Merc-c., Rhus-t., Stro., Terb. Urinary organs, kidneys, right : Berb., Coc-c., Lyc., Nux-v., Oci-c., Sars. Urinary organs, kidneys, left : Chin., Coloc., Merc., Par-b., Zin. Urinary organs, ureters : Ap., Bell., Berb., Canth., Lyc., Oci-c., Polyg., Sars., Sep. Urinary organs, bladder : Canth., Caust., Dulc., Hyo., Lyc., Merc-c., Nux-v., Pul., Rut., Sul. Urinary organs, bladder, burning : Berb., Canth., Caps., Merc-c., Terb. Urinary organs, bladder, painful, sore : Canth., Equi., Terb. Urinary organs, bladder, paralysis of : Ars., Gels., Hyo., Nux-v. Urinary organs, bladder, tenesmus : Bell., Cann., Canth., Dig., Dulc., Merc-c., Sul. Urinary organs, urethra : Arg-n., Cann., Canth., Caps., Clem., Lyc., Merc., Pho., Pul., Sul., Thu. Urinary organs, urethra, caruncle : Ars., Cann., Hep. Urinary organs, urethra, cramp : Clem. Urinary organs, urethra, discharge, fetid : Carb-v., Sil. Urinary organs, urethra, discharge, painless : Fer., Nat-s., Thu. Urinary organs, urethra, discharge, thin : Lyc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Pho., Psor., Sul.
